name: Dnepro Chicken Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into serving pieces.
2. Place in a large, heavy pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil.
3. Lower heat and simmer for 2 hours.
4. Remove from the heat, cool, and remove meat from the bones.
5. Skim the fat from the top of the liquid when it has cooled.
6. Chop the chicken meat into coarse chunks and return to the liquid.
7. Fry the salt pork with the onion and garlic until the pork is browned.
8. Place the pork, pork grease, onions, potatoes, carrots, and salt into the liquid.
9. Add 1 quart of hot water. Bring to a boil.
10. Boil for 10 minutes.
11. Reduce heat to simmer. Cook for another 10 minutes.
12. Add buttermilk and butter. Cover and cook for 10 more minutes.
13. Serve hot.
